name: Parallax Hearts
positioning: A cinematic music and story-world project from Vallen and What the Town Keeps.
audience: Listeners, readers, supporters, and visual-novel fans drawn to story-rich, atmospheric work.
voice: Cinematic, intimate, atmospheric, archive-like, emotionally grounded, rainy, mysterious but not fantasy or horror hype.
visualStyle: Rainy town atmosphere, archive notes, soft cinematic stills, music fragments, field reports.
postingFrequency: 2-4 atmospheric posts weekly, with release-note bursts around songs and story drops.
ctaOptions: Listen when the next release lands.
imageStyleRules: Use atmosphere to clarify the story fragment.
sampleHooks: The town keeps the things people cannot say out loud.
Some songs arrive as weather first.
Vallen writes like the rain is taking notes.
